enum_values.name: Error
enum_values.summary: The package was not loaded in Dynamo because of an error. See the Error property for more information

enum_values.name: Loaded
enum_values.summary: The package is fully loaded and is ready to be used

enum_values.name: None
enum_values.summary: Invalid state. The initial state for every package, before it is interpreted by Dynamo

enum_values.name: Unloaded
enum_values.summary: The package is not loaded in Dynamo and not deleted from package locations
